parameters.query: SELECT title, issuing_authority, jurisdiction, category, estimated_value, close_date, relevance_score, status, bid_decision, (close_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS days_until_close FROM tenders WHERE status NOT IN ('expired', 'lost', 'withdrawn') AND (close_date IS NULL OR close_date >= CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, close_date ASC LIMIT 15;

meta.description: GET /webhook/tenders — returns active tenders sorted by relevance for Glance.
